$schema_note: Single source of truth for the SwiftTUI org submodule registry. Edit THIS file, then run `python3 tools/registry/generate.py --write`. CI / `//:repo_registry_contract` run `--check`. The generator owns marked regions in MODULE.bazel, BUILD.bazel, and README.md, and emits tools/registry/repos.generated.sh for the contract scripts. Fields: name (submodule path), module (Bazel module name, null for non-Bazel repos), github (owner/repo as shown in the README table), url (.gitmodules URL), native_contract (README table prose), bazel_module (true = has a MODULE.bazel + @module//:native_gate wired into //:native_gates and is validated by every git-state contract check; false = pinning-only submodule, e.g. the org-profile repo).

repos.name: swift-tui-examples
repos.native_contract: Runnable Swift examples and demo gates
